We've been in the SAGE and ASI promotional products ecosystem for over 14 years. We know how brands buy, how distributors operate, and how factories produce.

Direct Access to China Manufacturing

We work directly with a vetted network of Chinese factories — factory-direct pricing, faster communication, tighter quality control for you.

OEM & ODM Product Development

Your logo on an existing product (OEM) or a completely original design (ODM) — we manage concept, tooling, sampling, production, and QC.

OEM · ODM · Private Label

Premium Packaging & Kitting Expertise

Custom gift set assembly is what we do best. We design packaging, source products, assemble kits, and fulfill to one address or thousands of recipients.

Custom Kitting · Gift Sets

Startups on first 100-unit kits to enterprise brands on 50,000-unit campaigns. Same quality process and attention to detail at every scale.

Any Scale · Same Quality

Global DDP Delivery

Delivered Duty Paid to your warehouse, office, or individual recipients in 40+ countries. One invoice. No surprise import costs.

Brief, sourcing, sampling, production, quality inspection, packaging, kitting, and global delivery — managed by one partner. No vendor juggling, no handoffs, no gaps.

How It Works

Simple process.
Reliable results.

We manage sourcing, production, QC, and delivery. You get a clear quote, sample approval, and on-time delivery.

Get a Proposal
01

Send Us Your Brief

Product type, quantity, deadline, and budget. We respond with a sourcing recommendation and itemized quote within one business day.

02

Sample Approval

Pre-production sample for your approval before mass production begins. Nothing goes into production without your sign-off.

03

Production & QC

We manage factory production and conduct a formal pre-shipment inspection. You receive a quality report with photos before goods ship.

04

DDP Delivery

Delivered Duty Paid to your warehouse, office, or recipients. Freight, customs, and duties covered. Clean delivery anywhere in the world.

About Us

PROMOTIONAL PRODUCTS · OEM / ODM · CUSTOM KITTING

"We built the bridge between what brands need and what manufacturing can actually deliver."

BRANDED GIFTS CO is a US-focused company specializing in custom merchandise, gift set kitting, and OEM/ODM manufacturing. Our sourcing, production, and quality control operations are based in China, backed by over 10 years of experience in the promotional products industry.

We are not a catalog company or a design studio. We are an operational partner with established factory partnerships, proven QC processes, and reliable delivery infrastructure.

Whether you're a brand looking for a dependable kitting partner or a distributor who needs a supplier that understands your business, we're built to support your projects from sourcing to delivery.

10+Years in SAGE / ASI Industry
1,000+Projects Completed
40+Countries Delivered
100–50K+Units Per Order
FAQ

Common
questions.

Get In Touch

Let's talk about your project

Have a specific question or ready to get started? Reach out directly — we respond within one business day.

Email Us 💬 WhatsApp Start A Branded Project
Do you work with promotional products distributors?
Yes. Promotional products distributors are one of our primary customer groups. With over 10 years of experience, we understand distributor requirements such as tight deadlines, custom branding, kitting projects, drop shipments, and large-volume orders.
What is your MOQ?
MOQ varies by product, material, and customization. Many items start at 100–500 units, while OEM or custom-developed products may require higher quantities. Contact us with your project details for a recommendation.
Can you handle OEM and ODM projects?
Absolutely. We support OEM and ODM manufacturing, including custom product development, private labeling, custom packaging, and branded merchandise programs.
Can you create custom packaging?
Yes. We offer custom gift boxes, mailer boxes, retail packaging, inserts, sleeves, labels, and fully branded kitting experiences.
Can you manage kitting and fulfillment?
Yes. We source products, assemble kits, apply branding, package items, and arrange global delivery — from employee onboarding kits to influencer boxes and corporate gifting programs.
